mapper.select: SELECT dept_id FROM sys_role_data_scope WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role_data_scope SET deleted = TRUE, updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT id, role_id, dept_id, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version FROM sys_role_data_scope WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND deleted = FALSE
